title: 4X4 Stone&deepslate
description: A useful and rather strange resource pack that makes stone and deep stone with a 4x4 texture.
body: _Hi!_ This resource pack includes a deep stone and a stone with a 4x4 texture.According to my long-standing idea, this should increase FPS (frame rate per second).I thought, "What if you make a resource pack in Minecraft that made a stone with a 4x4 texture?"That's how this resource pack turned out.
